rationale: Previous attempt's `assert forall` blocks had Verus auto-pick the `implies` premise (e.g. `pre_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr)`) as trigger, which never lined up with the ensures' triggers on `post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)` / `post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)` — so the inner equality assertions never fired the postN_ ensures. I add explicit multi-triggers on each `assert forall` and explicitly re-state both copies of every frame-condition ensures with matching triggers, then derive pointwise post1==post2 equality through pre_self_.
